name: Retail, 100% ground beef (US Bureau of Labor Statistics (2017))
description: Price of retail, 100% ground beef, in US$.
datasetName: Retail, 100% ground beef (US Bureau of Labor Statistics (2017)) (split)

source.name: Retail Beef Prices - US Bureau of Labor Statistics (2017)
source.dataPublishedBy: United States Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS)
source.additionalInfo:
Data taken as the US national average retail prices of 100% ground beef. Monthly averages have been converted to an annual average.

Prices by BLS are reported in US$ per pound (lb) of beef. We have converted this to US$ per kilogram using a conversion factor of 0.454.
